claims.statement: Burj Khalifa height is larger than Challenger Deep depth.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Burj Khalifa height: 828 m. Challenger Deep depth: 10984 m.

claims.statement: Cheetah sprint is slower than Elite sprinter top speed (approx.).
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Cheetah sprint: 120 km/h. Elite sprinter top speed (approx.): 45 km/h.

claims.statement: Appalachian Trail length is longer than Suez Canal length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Appalachian Trail length: 3500 km. Suez Canal length: 193 km.

claims.statement: There are fewer bits in a byte than keys on a standard piano.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 8 bits vs 88 keys.

claims.statement: World Wide Web proposed happened after Telephone patented.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. World Wide Web proposed: 1989. Telephone patented: 1876.
